ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points_returned" INTEGER /* Points returned by the defense */,
  "passing_yards_allowed" INTEGER /* Passing yards allowed by the defense */,
  "passing_touchdowns_allowed" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns allowed by the defense */,
  "yards_per_pass_return" REAL /* Yards per pass return */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kick returns */,
  "kick_return_yards" INTEGER /* Total kick return yards */,
  "kick_return_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of kick return touchdowns */,
  "yards_per_kick_return" REAL /* Yards per kick return */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the defense */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the defense */,
  "fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles forced by the defense */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered by the defense */,
  "defensive_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of defensive touchdowns */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season the performance metrics are from */,
  "week" TEXT /* The week of the season the performance metrics are from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Home or away game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, Super Bowl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Primary and secondary colors of the team
